title: Thestra: Ash Below
logline: A Summoner must clear the corrupted lower levels of Thestra to restore the city's life-support systems before its people suffocate.
setting: The surface is dead under an endless ash storm, and survivors dwell in Thestra, a vertical underground city. Its lower levels have been overrun by corrupted entities, cutting off water, food, and power.

acts.name: Act 1: Descent Prep
beats: Wake in Thestra Hub and speak with Engineer Voss
Accept quest to investigate the lower levels
Speak with Healer Mira for support quest
Enter Thestra Intake to begin descent
acts.climax: Party descends past the intake into the first corrupted floor

acts.name: Act 2: Clearing the Depths
beats: Fight through Corroded Conduit and fight Husk Brute
Restore power in Pulse Reactor and fight Static Wraith
Navigate Root Cavity and fight Thorn Parasite
Descend to Hydro Core and confront Boss Ash Sovereign
acts.climax: Defeat the Ash Sovereign to free the water purifier

acts.name: Act 3: Restoration
beats: Return to Thestra Hub with systems online
Report to Engineer Voss and Healer Mira
Receive closing briefing on the city's survival

cast.name: Engineer Voss
cast.concept: Grizzled hub engineer who dispatches the Summoner

cast.name: Healer Mira
cast.concept: Hub medic who requests aid for trapped survivors

cast.name: Husk Brute
cast.concept: Corrupted tank-type entity in the conduit

cast.name: Ash Sovereign
cast.concept: Corrupted overlord of the Hydro Core

maps.title: Thestra Hub
maps.concept: Vertical city safe zone with vendors and quest givers

maps.title: Thestra Intake
maps.concept: Entry shaft lit by failing lamps

maps.title: Pulse Reactor
maps.concept: Humming power room with rogue energy

quests.name: Clear the Lower Levels
quests.summary: Descend and eliminate corrupted entities blocking life support

quests.name: Aid the Survivors
quests.summary: Clear a path so hub medics can reach trapped lower-level survivors

quests.name: Restore the Purifier
quests.summary: Defeat the Ash Sovereign and bring the Hydro Core online

ending: With the Ash Sovereign dead and the Hydro Core restored, Thestra's water and power return; the Summoner is hailed as the city's lifeline.
